content:
Currently, when you don't have cards in the draw pile and you draw more, the cards from the discard pile are shuffle back in the deck. This can happen only 1 time per turn.

**Current problem:**
- This shuffle limit is also triggered by the normal cards draw you get at the start of the turn. This means that, if you have literally 0 cards (or up to 4 in normal circumstances) in the draw pile at the end of a turn, you will use the only deck shuffle available at the start of the next turn with the initial cards draw. 

This can be very limiting for decks and units that are based around discarding cards frequently.

**Proposed change:**
- Make so the start of turn draws don't use the singular deck reshuffle of the turn (if you really don't want to increase the reshuffle limits for some balance reasons).

Is this minor bug? It happened after the last maintenance, everytime new story stage is up my screen get stuck and couldn’t press any button. It’s been 2 or 3 days and i already “Resource Repair” but it’s doing nothing

Hello! I lost access to my original Morimens account after linking it to my Steam account. During the linking process, my previous account data was overwritten, and my progress was replaced with a new account. As a result, I lost all of my previous game data, including my characters, progress, purchase history, and any other account information. I would greatly appreciate any assistance in recovering my original account or restoring my lost data. Thank you for your time and support.
What was your old login method?
Google
And.... When you attempt to log on like that it gives you this?
Yes... I tried reinstalling, logging out of the account and logging back in, it still gives me this
Tried unlinking my steam account, it's just... gone
Idk how much they can help.
I see. Well, it's worth a try!
Tho sadly it's currently nighttime for the Devs there so don't expect an answer immediately. But I remember one guy had bought like 5000 dreams of medicine cov pieces which really sucked
By the meantime you can try finding the receipts
For when you made any purchases to track down the old uid if you have it
I still have my old UID here with me, but how exactly can I try looking for receipts?
Does it send an email to me?
You've made purchases on the game?
Good question. Let me see if I did
Yeah
Not many, but I did
Yep I just checked my email. When I've made purchases it sends me an online reciet
Look up qookka in your mail stuff
Uh... Well, I didn't get anything? But I do have a screenshot that proves that I did in fact spend money in the game, from the Before Memories Fade banner
With my old UID in it
I only have the confirmation code for when I created my account using google...
And another one from when I got Ryker
Uh. Btw when you mention "bind" you mean linking right?
Yeah?
Sorry, English is not my first language, I thought this term could be used interchangeably?  :(
Well they have bind and link so yeah. It can get confusing

Oh sorry, I didn't know

I started playing recently
If I am to be more specific, yesterday
When you open the "link account" page in "user center" do you have 5 things (the top cut ones are mine cause I linked to Google)
I have seven
But yes, from what I see in your screenshot, I got those as well
If you go back one window there is a purchase history. Is that empty?
Yes :/
I think you straight up used a different email xd
I used the same email...
My last resort would be to send a screenshot listing the purchases made in my credit card
Let me crop everything
That will probably be it but only towards the personnel not me
Don't send
Oh
There wouldn't be any sensitive info, just the items purchased
I'm not a Biav employee xd
Yeah, I thought it'd be best to at least keep it here? But following your judgement, I agree on waiting for a staff
Apologies, I am quite... panicked over all this
I was really enjoying the game and wanted to play it on pc..
So how many things were you linked to? Was when you linked steam resulting in losing it?

I created my account using google;
Then installed Morimens via Steam... Afterwards, I opened the game and let it download the resources, lastly I went over to the qookka website to link my steam account
Hm. Ok... Unlink steam and link google
And also login via Google on the steam game ver
Google is already linked, and so is Steam but unlinked. Should I re-link google?
Understood
The game must be thinking you are in a new account. If its not showing purchase data. You don't just lose it. Especially if you said you had a new uid
Well?
Relinked it, same issue
Wait, i have it on my phone still
Maybe...?
One second, let me try exiting my account from the PC platform
Look to use the Google login option not the steam one
Oh!! my idea worked. I believe I understand the situation now,
Using the actual google account and using the email pertaining to the google account for login are two separate things
Well... I don't know what happened, but I feel stupid now
I thought they'd be the same? Since... I created my qookka account using google...
https://klipy.com/gifs/sealyx-naked-gun
I'm sorry!!!
That's why I said a bit ago use the Google login option
The google login option takes me to the brand new account
Oooook.... Open the user center of THAT account you want. And look to BIND account
Not link, BIND
Ok so how did you log onto your phone account?

When I first installed it, I used the google option

Today, after downloading the steam version, once done linking it to my qookka account, I did the same thing and it presented me with a brand new one
Ok. Nuke your links on the pc version.
Done

Open the phone login, that's your account correct?

Open user center there and Bind account. You can use phone number or email for that purpose
I assume you did it since I said it 10 mins ago
Mhm, it's binded to my email
Sorry for all the trouble...
Ok. Now. On phone ver, go Link social media, link Google
Only that
-# if you have other things linked you can leave them be

I appreciate the help, I was too affected by the possibility of losing all of the (small) progress I've made in the game, so I overlooked the option to try using the qookka account to log in instead of the google one

I firmly believed there would be no difference between the two
Ok so. Pc and phone result in same login?
Yes

活囚籠的描述是回合結束...的狂氣
表現形式也是直接和基礎的5點狂氣合併了
這種不會被狂氣加成影響

但再衍化是和鏡中人一樣的
回合結束時...獲得狂氣
鏡中人可以吃到狂氣加成
和再衍化的表現形式也一樣是與基礎的5點狂氣分散獲取
||鏡中人要被削了||
了解，我們會綜合考慮下這裡的表現形式。之前存在很多不統一的部分，對於已有的不統一的會盡量採取上修來處理避免破壞遊玩體驗。

also, some form of indicator that the single shuffle within one turn has happened or not would be nice? I remember playing certain deck and after a flurry of cards played in one turn, i lost track whether the cards in discard pile would be recycled or I'd already used that shuffle limit...

people don't mind his exalt restrictions? compared to thais, who also has "double cast" with discount on exalt, he cannot use it on any generated, exhaust, or previously marked cards, it feels unnecessarily limiting?

if they think another thais-like double cast is too op and such limitation must stay, then perhaps he could at least make marked cards generate more skey or aliemus to its owner additionally when played? (like a duet of sorts, which fits his theme and skey role?)
His exalt does feel oddly restricting
Other games will do a reduced reward run as an option beyond the normal weekly limit
If toooooo many mats is a concern could throttle them after the weekly or even just do the ol gacha thing of making shards of a bigger currency
This has the monkebrain effect of encouraging purchases even though you have technically made the need to do those purchases lesser because people will see a grind and go "naw i can skip that"
So its win for company and win for players willing to do the grind when the alternative used to be "just be SoL"
